title: Sci-Fi Anti-Gravity Rider Video
description: A high-octane sci-fi video storyboard prompt featuring an anti-gravity rider escaping a collapsing floating megacity in a synthwave atmosphere.
promptText:
Style: 3D cinematic retrofuturistic sci-fi, stylized realism, colossal floating megacity collapsing from orbit, synthwave atmosphere, dramatic volumetric clouds, impossible scale, dynamic camera movement, high-speed action, cinematic destruction, 15-second vertical video pacing 
Pilot: lone anti-gravity rider in sleek white flight armor with illuminated blue accents, aerodynamic helmet, fearless expression, riding a futuristic hoverbike Camera points upward through thick clouds. A gigantic floating city is breaking apart overhead. Entire skyscrapers drift downward like asteroids. Monorails twist through the sky. The Pilot bursts into frame on a hoverbike, diving through the falling debris field. SFX: atmospheric roar, distant structural collapse, deep synth drone. 
Tracking shot beside the Pilot racing between collapsing towers. Buildings rotate slowly in freefall. Neon signs tumble through the air. A giant transit station tears apart behind her. VFX: sparks, falling holograms, debris trails. SFX: rushing wind, metal tearing, engine scream. 
A colossal orbital defense machine awakens among the wreckage. Rotating rings spin around its glowing core. The machine locks onto the Pilot and begins pursuit through the collapsing city. VFX: targeting lasers, reactor glow, energy pulses. SFX: warning alarms, reactor hum, heavy machinery. 
The Pilot accelerates through an upside-down skyscraper drifting through the atmosphere. Windows explode outward. Debris rushes past the camera as the defense machine fires massive energy blasts through the falling city. SFX: energy cannon discharge, sonic booms, collapsing steel. 
Epic ultra-wide shot. The Pilot escapes the debris field as the entire floating metropolis ignites during atmospheric reentry. Thousands of burning structures streak across the sky behind her like a man-made meteor shower. SFX: orchestral synth climax, atmospheric burn, final cinematic impact.

title: Monster Energy Rafael Leão Football Animation
description: A high-energy, aggressive aesthetic animation for a beverage campaign featuring footballer Rafael Leão with green claw-mark effects in a dark stadium.
promptText:
Ultra-premium beverage social-media poster, 3:4, Instagram hero, Behance front-page quality. Campaign "UNLEASHED". Edgy aggressive aesthetic with claw-mark energy and dark green glow. 

MASTER VISUAL: bold MONSTER ENERGY wordmark filling about 70% of canvas with the green claw-slash M logo top center. HERO SUBJECT: footballer Rafael Leão in a red-and-green Portugal jersey, fierce and explosive. POSE: dynamic mid-celebration with green claw-slash energy ripping across the frame. 

COLOR SYSTEM: Monster acid green, matte black, Portugal red, steel grey. BACKGROUND: a dark gritty stadium with green claw-slash light streaks and smoke. 

GRAPHIC SYSTEM: claw-mark graphics, energy can silhouette, aggressive grunge textures, micro spec text. 
Promotional text: "MONSTER ENERGY", "LEÃO EDITION", "UNLEASH THE BEAST". Title text reads "UNLEASHED". Giant centered "M O N S T E R" lettering. LIGHTING: dark moody scene with vivid green rim light. CAMERA: ARRI Alexa Mini LF, 50mm lens, high contrast, gritty.

images.alt: Monster Energy Rafael Leão Football Animation

title: Dynamic Street Dance MV
description: A highly detailed prompt for creating a 15-second vertical street dance music video with specific physics and character consistency rules.
promptText: Please create a 15-second vertical dance music video. The character should express the music with their whole body and dance dynamically.  format: vertical_9x16 fps:  24 total_duration: 15s  style: High-quality dance MV cinematic music video dance film street dance video high-quality character depiction natural body expression realistic weight shift realistic inertia expression realistic fabric movement realistic hair movement maintain the expression style of the original image high-quality visual beauty character_rules: ・Maintain the identity of the person or character in Image 1 ・Prioritize facial features ・Hair style ・Costume ・Color scheme ・Body shape ・Overall silhouette ・Only one person ・No facial distortion ・No finger distortion ・No foot distortion ・Maintain the natural joint structure of the body ・If Image 1 is a live-action person, maintain it as a live-action person ・If Image 1 is a 3DCG character, maintain it as 3DCG ・If Image 1 is an anime or illustration character, maintain that style ・No unnecessary live-action ・No unnecessary anime ・Respect the expression style of the original image ・Prioritize body expression over costume details・Maintain the character's individuality even while dancing  dance_style: Street dance Hip hop Urban dance Choreography Music video dance Power groove Dynamic groove Full body performance Sound synchronization Dance with presence Deep groove of 90s-2000s hip hop dancers Physical expression of a real dancer, not TikTok dance motion_rules: ・Express the music with your whole body ・Show the performance, not just the choreography ・Don't make movements small and tight ・Always release energy outwards ・Use your shoulders and arms extensively ・Make the shoulder rolls big ・Actively use your elbows ・Open your chest wide ・Shoulders, chest, and hips react to each beat ・Make the downs deeper ・Make the ups big ・Clearly express the down-up rhythm ・Strong knee bounces ・Make the weight shifts big ・Emphasize the side-to-side movement ・Actively use forward and backward weight shifts ・Transmit the rhythm born from the soles of your feet to your whole body ・Generate movement from the center of your body ・Draw large arm trajectories ・Make large use of space ・Frequently create silhouette changes - Makes the body appear larger - Responds powerfully to the accents of the music with shoulders, chest, and arms - Repeats stillness and explosion - Strong changes in tempo - Actively expresses oneself rather than being passive to the music - Confidence like an experienced street dancer - Presence like a dancer who stands out in a session - Not someone who dances in a club, but the main dancer in a music video - A big groove that is pleasing to watch - Full body synchronization with the music - Powerful - Dynamic - Oneness with the music  Structure: 0-3 seconds Full body shot Grasping the beat from the start Keeping rhythm with shoulders, chest, hips, and knees A presenceful introduction 3-6 seconds Focusing on shots above the knees Shoulder rolls Large arm movements Showing chest movements 6-8 seconds Full body shot Big down and up Shifting weight Powerful steps 8-10 seconds Close-up of face Expression Gaze Hair movement Presence as a dancer 10-13 seconds Full body shot Biggest movement Synchronized with the music Big silhouette change Energy like the chorus of a music video 13-15 seconds Slightly closer from full body Ending with a lingering feeling, the rhythm remains in your body until the very end.  camera_rules: ・Rhythmic cuts like in a music video ・Switch cuts every 1-2 seconds on average ・Switch cuts naturally with the accents of the music ・40% full body shots ・30% knee-up shots ・20% upper body shots ・10% close-ups of the face ・Use plenty of full body shots to show the flow of the dance ・Keep foot shots short ・Natural handheld shooting that follows the dancer ・Light handheld ・Natural focus shifts ・Natural lens breathing ・The camera shakes naturally in accordance with the up and down movements of the body ・No sudden zooms ・No high-speed rotations ・No excessive drone-like perspectives ・Prioritize showing the dance ・Full body shots at the beginning and end.  location_and_light: ・A background that best showcases the dance ・The background should not overshadow the person ・A street-style space ・Natural light ・Lighting that shows the three-dimensionality of the body ・A realistic atmosphere ・No excessive CG.  mood: Cool Stylish Energetic Street Cool A slightly emotional, rewatchable music video.  Important: Maintain the visuals of Image 1. Live-action remains live-action. 3DCG remains 3DCG. Animation remains animation. Illustrations remain illustrations. Enhance only the dance movements without changing the style of expression. Edit like a dance break scene in a music video. Cuts should be synchronized with the music. Switch cuts at the moment when the dance's energy is at its peak. Prioritize the dancer's appeal over camerawork. A quality as if real street dancers were performing in a music video shoot.

title: Cinematic FIFA World Cup Match Video
description: A highly detailed multi-scene video generation prompt for a FIFA World Cup match between Brazil and Argentina, featuring team entries, gameplay action, and goal celebrations.
promptText:
Ultra-realistic cinematic live-action FIFA World Cup 2026 match. Massive sold-out stadium packed with passionate fans. Brazil vs Argentina. Broadcast-quality sports cinematography, realistic players, epic atmosphere, 4K HDR.

Scene 1 (0-3s):
Brazil and Argentina national teams enter the stadium from the tunnel. Brazilian players in yellow jerseys, Argentine players in sky-blue and white striped jerseys. Fans waving flags, roaring crowd, dramatic camera tracking shots, intense World Cup atmosphere.

Scene 2 (3-8s):
Match begins. Fast-paced football action between Brazil and Argentina. Brazilian players exchange quick, accurate passes while Argentine defenders press aggressively. Dynamic camera follows the ball across the pitch with realistic sports broadcast movement.

Scene 3 (8-12s):
Brazilian star player receives a pass near the edge of the penalty area. He strikes a powerful shot. Cinematic slow motion as the ball rockets past the diving Argentine goalkeeper and hits the back of the net. Stadium erupts with thunderous cheers.

Scene 4 (12-15s):
Brazilian goal scorer celebrates passionately with teammates. Cut to a beautiful young woman and her friends in the crowd wearing Brazil jerseys, jumping, cheering, waving Brazilian flags, and celebrating the winning goal. Confetti, stadium lights, emotional victory atmosphere, epic cinematic ending.

Style: Ultra-realistic live-action, FIFA World Cup broadcast quality, dramatic slow motion, realistic crowd reactions, cinematic sports documentary style, high-energy atmosphere, professional camera work, 4K HDR.

images.alt: Cinematic FIFA World Cup Match Video

title: Steampunk Owl Adventure Flight
description: A dynamic video generation prompt for a continuous flight shot of a character riding a steampunk owl-eagle at high speed.
promptText: 10-second fantasy steampunk adventure hook, single continuous flight shot, already in motion from frame one. The girl is already riding the owl-eagle at full speed. No static

title: Hyper-Realistic Pro Surfing Video Prompt
description: A comprehensive cinematic video prompt for Seedance 2.0 featuring a professional surfer navigating a massive barrel wave with high-end physics and single-take camera movements.
promptText: [Character Lock] Strictly refer to Image 1 and the created surfboard character sheet. Maintain the exact face of the same female character, pale and clean skin tone, long black hair, blue eyes, body proportions (33C-26-34), and the floral pattern female surf suit defined in the character sheet. Do not change the costume, face, body type, hairstyle, color scheme, logo, or design elements. Keep the same surfboard. The character should look like a real professional surfer and perform world-class surfing skills that are dangerous but realistically believable. [Environment] Open ocean in bright daylight. Deep and clear blue sea water. Strong sunlight reflection. Massive waves. Dynamic spray. Strong sea breeze. The overall atmosphere should be fast, rough, thrilling, and extremely realistic. [Video Style] Hyper-cinematic 15-second continuous single take. Absolutely no cuts. No hidden cuts. No transitions. No montage. One complete continuous shot. Hyper-realistic action. Natural motion blur. Water droplets on the lens. Sea water hitting the camera. Strong wave sounds. Friction sound of the board cutting the surface. Wind sound. Real human body weight shifts and balance adjustments should be naturally expressed. The entire video must be immersive and physically realistic. [Opening Shot] At the start of the video, the character is already riding a massive wave. The camera starts at a very close position right in front of her. The frame focuses on her face and upper body. Long wet black hair blows in the wind. Her expression is calm, fearless, and perfectly focused. Strong sunlight reflects off the water. Sea water moves rapidly under the surfboard. [Camera Movement] The camera starts briefly in front of her upper body and then moves to the rear in one smooth, seamless motion, rotating around her body. Upon reaching the rear, the camera immediately drops to surfboard height. From then on, until the end of the video, the camera always maintains a low position close to the surface. It tracks from behind near the tail or rail of the board. Never move to a high angle. Always maintain the feeling of chasing the surfboard from behind. [Action Flow] Once the camera is fixed at board height behind her, she accelerates strongly in a deep crouch. She leans her upper body aggressively forward and races along the wave wall. She performs the first powerful bottom turn. The surfboard rail digs deep into the surface, and a massive spray explodes behind her. This is followed by a rapid climb up the wave face for an aggressive carving turn. A strong spray from the board tail explodes, hitting the camera lens. She immediately reaches one hand down to perform a hand drag. Her fingertips graze the water surface for a long time, and a stream of water scatters behind. The camera tracks this closely from right behind the board. She speeds up into a steeper section of the wave. [Aerial Moment] Upon reaching the lip of the wave, she launches strongly and performs a high-difficulty aerial. She soars high into the air with the surfboard. Time shifts into dramatic slow motion. The camera still follows the aerial maneuver from a low position at board height. She rotates her upper body toward the camera. She strikes a stylish pose while grabbing the board with one hand. Wet black hair flutters in the air. Numerous water droplets float around, reflecting the sunlight. The surfboard design is clearly visible. She finishes the aerial while maintaining perfect balance. [Landing and Acceleration] She naturally returns to her stance and lands cleanly on the wave. A massive spray explodes at the moment of landing. The camera still follows right behind at board height. Immediately after landing, she performs continuous strong pumping to maximize speed. She shifts her center of gravity rapidly forward and backward, accelerating even harder. The surfboard glides across the water surface. [Barrel Entry] A massive hollow wave forms in front. She crouches deeper in a low stance. She enters toward the inside line of the wave wall. A massive lip begins to collapse over her head. The camera follows right behind her, maintaining board height. Peripheral vision gradually darkens. The wave walls rise on both sides. A massive water tunnel is formed. [Barrel Riding] She passes through the inside of a deep barrel at top speed. She races along the center of the tunnel while maintaining perfect balance. She reaches her front hand near the wave wall to graze the ripple. Water droplets scatter from her fingertips. The camera tracks the inside of the tunnel from right behind the board tail. A massive ceiling of water rotates overhead. Sunlight passing through the transparent water wall reflects in blue light. Numerous water particles float in the air. The strong light of the tunnel exit is visible in the distance. The sound of the waves echoes like thunder. All movement is maintained within a single continuous take. [Barrel Exit and Final Scene] She rushes toward the tunnel exit at top speed. The light ahead becomes stronger. A massive wall of water collapses from behind. She maintains perfect balance until the last moment. The moment she exits the tunnel, an explosive spray bursts in all directions. Intense sunlight fills the screen. She finally passes just below the wave lip, drawing a high-speed line. Massive sprays explode on both sides. Water droplets constantly splash on the lens. The massive wave wall in front gets closer. The camera maintains the same low tracking angle. She continues her full-speed dash in a steady posture. The video ends at the moment she continues to rush toward the massive wave. No text. No logo. No subtitles. Ultra Realistic Water Physics. Extreme Surfing Action. Deep Barrel Ride. Inside The Tube. Heavy Hollow Wave. Aggressive Carving. Ha
